qa_pairs.question: What type of technical support is offered to researchers who have received a resource allocation?
qa_pairs.answer: Our team of experts is available to help researchers utilize their allocations. This support may include installing and configuring software packages, assisting with code optimization, and providing detailed advice on how to solve technical issues.

qa_pairs.question: What are the limitations of the technical support provided by Federation staff with a resource allocation?
qa_pairs.answer: While Federation staff may occasionally write some code, a resource allocation does not entitle a research group to deep "embedded" programming support. As a general guideline, staff will help solve problems requiring a few days of effort, rather than a few months.
